# ceph_wait_online (Resource)

This dummy resource is waiting for Ceph to be online at creation time for up to 1 hour. This is useful for example on a bootstrap procedure.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ceph_wait_online" "wait" {
  cluster_name = "my-cluster"

  timeouts {
    create = "30m"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_name` (String) That's a workaround to actually have an id, set this to something unique (i.e.: the cluster name).

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `online` (Boolean) If the cluster is online, only checked at creation time (always true)

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
